seo.title: Mobile Dog Grooming Review Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your mobile grooming van. Route unhappy clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Mobile Dog Grooming

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Mobile Dog Grooming
hero.subheading: You meet clients at the curb and drive away. ReviewFlo catches them by text before the next stop.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Mobile Groomer Faces

items.heading: The appointment ends in a driveway, not at a front desk
items.body: There is no natural moment at a counter to ask for a review.

items.heading: Routing and traffic make every day unpredictable
items.body: Follow-up slips when you are already late to the next house.

items.heading: Van breakdowns and no-shows show up as angry reviews
items.body: Stressful days become one-star stories that stay visible for years.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Mobile Groomers

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Text-based asks that fit van life
items.body: Send from your phone as soon as the dog is handed back.

items.heading: Catch heat before it hits Google
items.body: Private feedback gives you room to reschedule or explain.

items.heading: No shop computer required
items.body: Everything works from the devices you already carry.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Does this work if I only have a phone?
items.a: Yes. Text and email links are enough.

items.q: What if I serve multiple cities?
items.a: Your Google Business Profile still benefits from steady reviews tied to your service area.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing for happy versus unhappy clients without enterprise pricing.

items.q: Can I brand the link to my van business?
items.a: You control the messaging customers see when they open the flow.
Send the ask after successful visits. Skip the automation on days you pause service.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Mobile Grooming Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
